items.name_en: Burberry Exquisite Round 'Louise' Bag, made from the brand's iconic eco-friendly canvas. This eco-friendly material is primarily made from renewable resources, requiring less water and generating less carbon dioxide compared to traditional coated canvas. The bag is named after Queen Victoria's daughter Louise, who was also an artist and advocate for gender equality. Can be worn crossbody or worn as a handbag by removing the strap. 17 x 7 x 17cm
